Off Calendar Jul-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Mary Gemma O'Keefe, Esq., for Margaret Liddell, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Ms. O'Keefe that she is submitting on the papers. The court advises that it intends to grant partial relief and further clarifies its intent. No objection to the preceding is presented.

The subject matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant as discussed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nguyen. Not Reported.
